title: mentha longifolia subsp. undulata
intro: Mentha longifolia subsp. undulata, also known as woolly mint, is a subspecies of perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Mentha longifolia subsp. undulata include its ability to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, colds, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce fever and improve oral health. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
